title:
гӮігғігӮҜгғӘгғјгғҲжү“иЁӯдёӯгҒ«зҸҫгӮҢгҒҹзҸҫе ҙзӣЈзқЈрҹҰүрҹ‘·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҳӮвңЁ
#animals #cute #owl #lapan #construction
prompt_text: A construction site at dusk where a worker in a white hard hat, high-visibility vest, and tan pants kneels on a fresh concrete slab. A small, brown burrowing owl stands defiantly on the wet cement, leaving a trail of footprints. The worker uses a hand trowel to smooth the surface near the owl under clear, golden-hour lighting. Scaffolding and a construction yard are visible in the background.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A construction site at dusk where a worker in a white hard hat, high-visibility vest, and tan pants kneels on a fresh concrete slab. A small, brown burrowing owl stands defiantly on the wet cement, leaving a trail of footprints. The worker uses a hand trowel to smooth the surface near the owl under clear, golden-hour lighting. Scaffolding and a construction yard are visible in the background.

cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle medium shot, static framing focused on the interaction between the worker and the owl.

actions: The worker slowly runs a metal trowel along the wet concrete toward the owl.
The owl remains stationary, staring directly at the camera with wide eyes.
The worker speaks gently to the owl while gesturing with the tool.
The owl blinks and shifts its head slightly but refuses to move from its spot.
dialogue: The worker says in Japanese: 'Please move, I want to finish this part.'
Ambient construction site sounds, including distant machinery and wind.
